lever: fused dense-i64 LEFT merge builder (build_single_key_dense_i64_left_merge_output): compact matched plan (left_pos, bucket_start, run_len; usize::MAX sentinel for unmatched) replaces the two Vec<Option<usize>> position vectors (~627MB intermediate on 19.6M rows) + per-column reindex walks; lanes built with the proven inner-builder machinery (muis1 tapes, 6bsw3 row-chunked split_at_mut fill, 3ad4n RLE left lanes) + ONE shared word-fill validity mask cloned per nullable right lane
scenario: perf_profile left_join 100000, card 512, 50% key overlap (9.8M output rows), 3 iters
profile_evidence: re-profile post-lt5qx: dense_int64_left_positions 30.8% (24.4% in Option<usize> push — vecs WERE with_capacity'd, the cost is writing+dropping the 627MB intermediate itself) + reindex_by_positions 34.5% (the per-column walks over those vectors); bead's realloc-growth hypothesis was wrong, the representation was the problem

paired_hyperfine_left_join.speedup: 17.65x +/- 0.95 (load ~27-32; alternating per-iter pairs agree: 502-545 -> 28.5-32.2 ms/iter, 3 consistent pairs)

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes - plan is the same left probe order; matched runs replay the same CSR bucket ranges (right rows in first-seen bucket order, identical to dense_int64_left_positions)
isomorphism.dtype_semantics: right lanes keep dtype Int64 with Null(NullKind::Null) at unmatched rows == reindex_by_positions missing semantics (LazyNullableInt64); left lanes repeat left values run_len times == take_positions; NO Float64 promotion (matches the replaced path, pinned by golden)
isomorphism.routing: same dense-span accept gate (span <= 4*rows+1024) as dense_int64_left_positions; non-i64/nullable columns, empty sides, multi-key, sort, indicator, validate all fall through to the unchanged position-vector path; all-left-matched joins still route to the fused inner builder first
isomorphism.sink_check: sink=29447040 identical before/after (9815680 rows x 3 iters)

supporting_additions: ValidityMask::from_words (doc-hidden ctor, debug-asserts tail bits zero) + from_i64_values_with_validity made doc-hidden pub + set_validity_bit_range word-fill helper
